text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Reports accidental fall with nasal trauma on 12/18/21 and subsequent bilateral epistaxis.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "At today's visit, the patient reports no nasal respiratory obstruction.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Slight deviation to the right of the nasal pyramid.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "In anterior rhinoscopy, no signs of hemoset, hypertrophic inferior turbinates (>> on the right), no blood crusting.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Two nasal cotton swabs soaked in anesthetic are applied.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Infiltration with 2 cc of lidocaine.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Followed by procedure to reduce the fracture of the nasal bones.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "Upon completion, no bleeding.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "A splint is applied.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "Useful: - Avoid physical exertion for a week; - In case of pain: paracetamol 1 g -> 1 tablet every 8 hours if in pain.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "ENT check-up in 7 days for re-assessment.", 0.0, 0.5)
